name: legal-brief
description: Codex companion manifest for the legal-brief plugin. Drives Codex 5.5 tasks (verify, draft, apply, revise) inside the legal-brief drafting pipeline via the vendored codex-companion runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent Russian legal document drafting pipeline.
interface.longDescription: Legal Brief turns a folder of case materials into a finished Russian procedural document through a 7-stage multi-model pipeline (Sonnet summary, Codex verify/draft/apply, Opus review and adversarial roles).
defaultPrompt: Составь процессуальный документ из папки с делом.
